steps.title: Use the neutrality contrast
steps.content: The sentence contrasts politicians' claim with the point that most journalists try to be neutral. The concession that some let their own views enter reporting shows the claim concerns unfair influence by personal views.

steps.title: Reject unrelated traits
steps.content: A describes emotional sensitivity, not impartiality. C means lacking accurate information, and D means not connected to the issue. None matches the contrast between personal views and neutrality. The answer is B.
